what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub for a design-source image asset (recent-pitches/p-28.jpg), recording its channel path, content-addressed blob URI, MIME type, author session, creation time, and a ground-truth source label.
observations: Image dimensions w and h are both 0
MIME is image/jpeg but no image data is embedded
Source is labeled design_source_material and the body calls it 'SOURCE design ground-truth'
Author session is ch-3mpkjg3r and created timestamp is 2026-06-22T11:31:02.563599+00:00
standouts: Content-addressed blob URI for an external image
Zero recorded width/height for an image entry
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter ledger metadata with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, created
References the actual asset via a blob:// URI rather than embedding it
Breaks the convention that an image ledger entry would have nonzero width and height
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing or unextracted media metadata
links is empty, so no cross-references or relationships are captured
The file carries almost no descriptive information about what the image depicts
notes: A minimal metadata stub for a design-source JPEG pitch image, marked as ground-truth but with zero dimensions and no links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-28.jpg contain?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a design ground-truth source record; actual content is a metadata-only stub with unresolved dimensions and no descriptive or relational content.
intention_signals: Register a specific pitch image in the design-source channel as a ground-truth source asset so it can be located, attributed, and linked within the broader ledger.
novelty: The combination of an explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' label with a blob URI inside a markdown ledger stub, plus zero image dimensions.
contribution: Provides a stable identity and provenance record for a design-source pitch image, including channel path, blob reference, MIME type, author session, and creation timestamp, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata stub for an image asset named recent-pitches/p-28.jpg in the design-source channel, recording its blob URI, MIME type, author session, creation timestamp, and a ground-truth source label, with zero width and height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog and provide provenance for a design-source pitch image within the channel-memory ledger.
